title: dryopteris laevis
intro: Dryopteris laevis is a species of fern commonly known as the smooth buckler fern, which is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris laevis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of dried leaves, which can be made into teas or infusions, or used as an ingredient in traditional remedies and supplements.
